items.name: Open Managed Control Plane (openMCP)
items.description: This open source platform provides everything a team needs to orchestrate software in an enterprise environment. Built on top of a secure, enterprise-grade Gardener Kubernetes stack, it connects seamlessly with essential enterprise tools like code repositories, artifactories, identity providers, and auditing systems. Designed for security, compliance, and scalability, the platform integrates Kubernetes-compliant operators and cloud providers while supporting reusable, organization-specific templates and enforceable policies. It empowers engineering teams to move fast without compromising on governance—turning cloud-native complexity into a manageable, traceable, and repeatable system.
